overview.what: A hands-on demonstration of a modern vector database. It shows how to store embedded documents, query them by semantic similarity, and use metadata filtering to narrow down search results.
overview.how_it_works: ChromaDB acts as an on-disk vector store. It automatically generates embeddings for added text strings and builds an efficient index for k-NN queries. It also supports 'where' clauses for traditional metadata-based filtering alongside vector search.
what_you_learn: Installing and configuring a vector database
